title: Meaningful Quotes for a Prosperous Pongal
description: The article discusses traditional quotes associated with the Pongal festival, a harvest festival celebrated in South India. These quotes signify the beginning of a new year, abundance and prosperity, the importance of consuming healthy food, and gratitude towards cows.
